name: teams-domain-tests
description: Create unit tests for teams-multi-tenancy domain
acceptanceCriteria: Tests verify all 5 entities can be created with valid data
Tests verify reference fields resolve to entity instances
Tests verify TenantMember.isBillingAdmin computed view works correctly
Tests verify findByTenant collection methods return correct results
Tests verify role enum validation (admin, billing_admin, editor, member)
Tests use NullPersistence for fast, isolated execution
